---
title: "A. C. Shipton"
---

## A. C. Shipton

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1892)

### Biography

She collaborated with Helen Shipton and was probably her sister Amy Cuthbert Shipton (b. Barlow, Derbyshire 1865). [census returns; register of birth]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
